10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001011110 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  000 = 0 * 00
  110 = 1 * 10
  0010 = 00 * 10
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1100 = 110 * 0
  1110 = 1 * 110
  00000 = 00 * 000
  11001 = 1100 * 1
  11110 = 1 * 1110
  111110 = 1 * 11110
  1011001 = 10 * 11001
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  11001110 = 1100 * 1110
  000111110 = 000 * 111110
  001000000 = 0010 * 00000
  001011110 = 0010 * 11110
  110011001 = 1100 * 11001
  110111110 = 110 * 111110
  101010101011001 = 10101010 * 1011001
  11001110001011110 = 11001110 * 001011110
  000111110110111110 = 000111110 * 110111110
  001000000110011001 = 001000000 * 110011001
  101010101011001000111110110111110 = 101010101011001 * 000111110110111110
  00100000011001100111001110001011110 = 001000000110011001 * 11001110001011110
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001011110 = 101010101011001000111110110111110 * 00100000011001100111001110001011110
